chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1198 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 18.07.2025 Mr. Umer Farooque Rahu advocate a/w petitioners Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Additional A.G Sindh a/w SIP Liaquat Ali and SIP Ghulam Abbas *** Mr. Arshad Ali Keerio advocate files power on behalf of the respondents No.7 and 8, which is taken on record. Pursuant to notice Investigation Officer of Crime No.57 of 2024 registered at P.S Lakhi Ghulam Shah District Shikarpur under Section 365-B PPC has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1, wherein she has categorically stated that she being sui-juris and divorced lady has contracted second marriage with the petitioner No.2 of her free will and has not been abducted as alleged in the underlying FIR, which is false and concocted. Investigation Officer submits that based on the statement of petitioner No.1 he will file his report before the learned Magistrate concerned for disposal of the case under C-class. Learned counsel for the petitioners expressed satisfaction and seeks disposal of the petition accordingly. In view of the above, instant petition stands disposed of with directions to Investigation Officer to submit his final report within seven days from today before the learned Magistrate concerned in view of the statement of petitioner No.1, who shall pass a speaking order in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Sajjad Ali Jessar
